name: agentman-alpha-equity-research
description: Multi-agent equity research plugin with planning-first workflow, investor profile scoring, and advanced valuation (Comps + Merton Model + Asset-Based NAV). Orchestrates 7 specialized agents across 5 MCP tools. Evaluates stocks through Conservative, Moderate, and Aggressive investor lenses using a 50-point scoring rubric per profile. Supports Damodaran DCF, Comparable Company Analysis, Merton Model, and Asset-Based Valuation.
